name: Tibor Serly
abstract: Tibor Serly (Hungarian pronunciation: [ˈtibor ˈʃɛrli]; Losonc, Kingdom of Hungary,  25 November 1901 – London, 8 October 1978) was a Hungarian violist, violinist, and composer.

works_created.t: Chamber Folk Music for Violin, Piano, and Tarogato
Piano Sonata No. 1 in Modus Lascivus
Innovations for Harp and String Quartet

about_quotes.speaker: Joe Muranyi
about_quotes.evidence: her teacher was this old lady, it was Mrs. Serly, and her son was Tibor Serly... he used to play piano for their dancing.
about_quotes.doc_title: Joe Muranyi interviewed by Monk Rowe, New York City, New York, January 11, 2007
